title: 8 Pcs Measuring Cups and Spoons Set, Stackable Stainless Steel Handle Accurate Tablespoon for Measuring Dry and Liquid Ingredients Small Teaspoon with Plastic Head (Black)
features: [exact scale and volume] the stainless steel handle is engraved with visible standard metric units to ensure that you are using the correct measurement. There are 8 different sizes of cups to meet your daily needs. 1 cup (236 ml), 1 / 2 cup (118 ml), 1 / 3 cup (78 ml), 1 / 4 cup (59 ml), 1 tbsp (15 ml), 1 / 2 tbsp (7.5 ml), 1 tbsp (5 ml), 1 / 2 tbsp (2.5 ml)

[food grade material] the head of the measuring spoon is made of durable BPA Free material, and the handle is made of 2cr15 stainless steel. It has long service life, will not rust or bend, and is suitable for wet and dry ingredients
[easy to clean] the measuring cup is odor proof and stain proof. You can use a dishwasher for quick cleaning or rinse with water. The measuring spoon can be cleaned by dishwasher

[easy to carry and store] the lightweight cup and spoon sets can be nested with each other and fixed together by stainless steel rings that are easy to open and close to ensure worry free sorting and storage
[professional services] if you have any questions, please contact us. We have a professional team dedicated to helping you and helping you answer any questions you may have
